== Notes for [[Item:Q112900|Q112900]] ==

= Dom Martim Gonçalves de Nomães =

Also called Rodrigo Martins de Nomães

* Born circa 1140
* [https://www.geni.com/photo/view?album_type=photos_of_me&id=6000000013984824781&photo_id=6000000173900050884&position=0 '''A 1386 Vernacular Charter from Portugal,'''] written by the scribe Martim Gonçalves in a fine Johanine chancery script and bearing the rubric of D. João I, King of Portugal and founder of the Aviz dynasty. This ms is significant as a very early example of a text in Old Portuguese.
* [https://our-royal-titled-noble-and-commoner-ancestors.com/p4680.htm#i140526 '''Our Titled Commoner Ancestors''']

=Married =

* Married: '''Dona Mayor Soares Galego,''' circa 1177

=Children=

* '''Pedro Rodrigues, V,''' b. c 1180
* '''Rodrigo Martins de Nomães, Señor de Reviñade y Silva-Escura'''

==[https://dokumen.pub/os-cavaleiros-que-fizeram-as-cantigas-aproximaao-as-origens-socioculturais-da-lirica-galego-portuguesa-9788522808403.html Souto - THE KNIGHTS THAT MADE THE CANTIGAS.indd 184]

'''THE KNIGHTS THAT MADE THE CANTIGAS'''

25/09/2012 15:21:43

Although there are elements to think that Pedro Rodrigues de Pereira and Pedro Rodrigues da Palmeira were a single individual53, the onomastic formulas attributed to them only allow, in principle, to identify the troubadour with this son of Elvira Gonçalves (Oliveira 1994: 424) 54. He could be Pedro Rodrigues who, along with Pedro Mendes and his nephew (?),Martim Gonçalves[of Nomães?], he commits, in 1225, in the Church of S. Miguel de Guimarães and before the archbishop of Braga, not to have malados in the estates of the monastery of Landim, founded by his grandfather, Gonçalo Rodrigues (Figueiredo 1800 / I: 345, no. 140). The only documentary record - without chronological indication - in which we find the troubadour's name mentions a palace in Vila Nova (from Famalicão) that had belonged to him: “the [...] palace of Vila Nova, which belonged to don Pedro Rodriguiz da Palmeira that is not judged by Vermue ”[D.40]. The data relating to the mother and other relatives of his generation lead us to admit the possibility that he was poetically active from c. 1185.

The line name would be, in fact, “Nomães”, attributed in the Books of Lineages to Gonçalo Rodrigues de Nomães, eldest son of Elvira Gonçalves and Rodrigo Nunes. On the other hand, it is only in the Book of the Deão that this “Pero Rodrigues, that I die of love” (LD 7G4) among the children of Elvira Gonçalves da Palmeira is explicitly mentioned: Gonçalo, Martim, Urraca and Guiomar Rodrigues. On the contrary, in Count D. Pedro's Lineages Book only Gonçalo Rodrigues de Nomães, Urraca and Guiomar Rodrigues (LC 33A1-2) is mentioned. In this last work, Pedro Rodrigues da Palmeira is mentioned, but only in the episode of “death of love” and without explaining the family origins. Mattoso, in the LC "Index", identifies Palmeira and Pereira (p. 302). 53

D. Martim Rodrigues, bishop of Porto between 1191 and 1235, was also the son of the former and brother of the troubadour: “and another son was named Dom Martim Rodrigues, who was bishop of Porto” (LD 7G4). 54

==[https://archive.org/details/provasdahistoria01sous/page/150/mode/2up?q=Ruy+Martins Evidence of the genealogical history of the Portuguese royal house: taken from the instruments of the archives of the Torre do Tombo, from the serenissima house of Bragança, from several cathedraes, monasteries, and other particulars of this kingdom by Sousa, Antonio Caetano de, 1674-1759]

* '''Page 151;''' And Beatris, daughter Joaõ Peres Redondo, and Oonúnhx Soores de Merlo cappu with Pêro Soares Coelho, and did not hear of children and died after D. Ruy Martins de Nomaes, son of D. Martim Gonçalves de Nomaes, and Joana Rodrigues, and Martim Rodrigues and Orraca Rodrigues, and Joanna Rodrigues, daughter of Ruy Martins de Nomaes *, was married to Martim Vafqui, son of D. VafcO Lourenço da Cuña, and was joined by Vaíco Martins Sequo and Ruy Martins de Nomaes and Beatris Martins and Tereja Martins. And by Vafco Martins Sequo fahio Martim Vafqui q was married with Violante Lopes daughter of Lopo Fernandes Tcixoto, and fahio Joana Vafqui and Beinguingu Vafqui married with Ruy Vaíquim, and one hundred Gonçalo Vaíquim dazevedo, and Ruy Martins de Nomaes brother of Vafaco Sequo was married to Senhorinha Rodrigues, daughter of Ruy Gonçalves Bifardel, and Senhorinha Fernandes Chacim, and she was the wife of Pêro Paes dalMarcnga and other children and Beatriz Martins Irmaã de Vafco Sequo was married to Fernaõ Martins Teixeira and played with Martim Fernandes Teixeira, and Martim Fernandes Porto Carreiro's wharf; and Martim Fernandes son of Fernaõ Martins de Teixeira married with daughter of Pêro Efteves de Beja meirinho mayor q was from ntre I give

* Martim Gonçalves, and efte Martim Gonçalves worked with Mor Soares, daughter of Soeiro Dias Galego, and in Gonçalo Martins and Ruy Martins and Elvira Martins, and Gonçalo Martins died in the Lide of D. Henrrique. Ruy Martins feu Irmaõ married with Beatriz Jlvares daughter of D. Joaõ Peres Redondo and played in Joana Rodrigues and Maria Rodrigues, and Orraca Rodrigues, and efta Joana Rodrigues played with Martim Vafques da Cunha son of D. Vafco Lourenço.

* '''Page 175:''' Sancha martins daughter of Martim Fernandes de Riba de Vizela was married to D. Gonçalo Rodrigues deNomaes, and fete in '''Martim Gonçalves, and efte Martim Gonçalves worked with Mor Soares, daughter of Soeiro Dias Galego,''' and in Gonçalo Martins and Ruy Martins and Elvira Martins, and Gonçalo Martins died in the Lide of D. Henrrique. Ruy Martins feu Irmaõ married with Beatriz Jlvares daughter of D. Joaõ Peres Redondo and played in Joana Rodrigues and Maria Rodrigues, and Orraca Rodrigues, and efta Joana Rodrigues played with Martim Vafques da Cunha son of D. Vafco Lourenço and played in Vafco Martins Seco , and Ruy Martins deNomaes, and daughters and sons ca de fuu said, and Maria Rodrigues married with Martim Affonfo de Rezende, and D. Mayor Martins daughter of D. Martim Fernandes de Riba de Vizela married with D. Ponço AfFoníb de Tom.I. X ii Boyaó

=Links=

* https://genearc.net/index.php?op=ZGV0YWxoZVBlc3NvYS5waHA=&id=MTQ0MDQ=
* https://repositorio.ul.pt/bitstream/10451/23960/1/ulfl200608_tese.pdf
* https://livrozilla.com/doc/722972/os-portugueses-nos-livros-de-repartimiento-da-andaluzia--...
* https://www.slideshare.net/mobile/castrokk/meus-finslinharevd

=Sources=

* OS FROILAZ, A DYNASTY OF TRACES [CHAPTER II] Posted on March 24, 2015 by fidalgosdenaron, TOMO II, CHAPTER II - https://oarqueologodenaron.com/2015/03/24/os-froilaz-unha-dinastia-de-trasancos-capitulo-ii/
* FamÍlia (2) Beraldo, By Wanderley - https://books.google.com/books?id=uSZ6DwAAQBAJ&pg=PA840&lpg=PA840&dq=Rodrigo+Romães+de+Monterroso+and+Udraica+Guterres&source=bl&ots=7YBkvRdRjy&sig=ACfU3U0AHuOWa-nSbuHQJwHn2oB7_63mZQ&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjl1NCs7qjhAhWwHDQIHZdTD1gQ6AEwDXoECAYQAQ#v=onepage&q=Rodrigo%20Romães%20de%20Monterroso%20and%20Udraica%20Guterres&f=false
* Diccionario histórico, genealógico y heráldico de las familias ..., Volume 2, By Luis Vilar y Pascual - https://books.google.com/books?id=2C0BAAAAQAAJ&pg=PA230&lpg=PA230&dq=Rodrigo+Romães+Conde+de+Monterroso&source=bl&ots=h8pxAXvOyB&sig=ACfU3U1gUuJ3Jbu5KIsnkp-Rk-gu37tapw&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwix3uKhj63hAhUCAXwKHbF9Am0Q6AEwBHoECAkQAQ#v=onepage&q=Rodrigo%20Romães%20Conde%20de%20Monterroso&f=false
* Our Royal Titled Noble Ancestors - https://our-royal-titled-noble-and-commoner-ancestors.com/p5269.htm
* [S11600] 40000 Ancestors of the Counts of Paris, 29-244.
* [S11600] 40000 Ancestors of the Counts of Paris, 30-311.
* A Revisionary History of Portuguese Literature, edited by Miguel Tamen, Helena Carvalhão Buescu - https://books.google.com/books?id=-Ix8o85Px8gC&pg=PA22&lpg=PA22&dq=Dom+Martim+Gon%C3%A7alves+de+Nom%C3%A3es&source=bl&ots=sYR-hkYb0T&sig=ACfU3U1eJfp0g5ZRKGSsEYYh8VmD-fNsdA&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwigiZ-86MzvAhWKJzQIHf5mCtw4ChDoATABegQICRAC#v=onepage&q=Dom%20Martim%20Gon%C3%A7alves%20de%20Nom%C3%A3es&f=false
* Ffeguras & Sinaees III. Heráldica do Mosteiro de Almoster, Tiago de Sousa Mendes, e António de Castro Henriques - https://d1wqtxts1xzle7.cloudfront.net/47642907/Art_04_p083-104_Tiago_Mendes_e_Antonio_Henriques.pdf?1469874752=&response-content-disposition=attachment%3B+filename%3DFfeguras_and_Sinaees_III_Heraldica_do_M.pdf&Expires=1616726917&Signature=ZmRMC0O~I1UOY~MuXrKK~0qf2AkiuGRU0jBNXEezaqVPnOM9A1~apMev-CE8SVqUVxCGCVV9NgQhWjcCdkcvGiad8RzrElFOAZb3qFyzdEzRje8MlSEcnJpXVoGtp0O3w30fyUkZIidgQ3gHaQLkirRmjrfzdLJt388f691XLIjUAQ7Q0VUCz1ZdQ7ckNHJ3e6HmS2bj4U8QjngNrnEx-yTH5~f~HatLyoxK04iwpJqpUmNp2LgyvcSM53R-OISI71aPPqVMbPcxE8NERre-3IiSLmz~OL7vc79harQGFELLyLk3sSGy3UTKyWl4v4AOBcz0Wb2WbUjA~DDTyqitKw__&Key-Pair-Id=APKAJLOHF5GGSLRBV4ZA
* Souto - OS CAVALEIROS QUE FIZERAM AS CANTIGAS.indd - DOKUMEN.PUB - https://dokumen.pub/os-cavaleiros-que-fizeram-as-cantigas-aproximaao-as-origens-socioculturais-da-lirica-galego-portuguesa-9788522808403.html
* PORTVGALIAE - https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/54/Portugaliae_Monumenta_Historica_-_Scriptores%2C_v._1_fasc._2.pdf

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
